name: 她杀 - The Suspected Murder
short_description: Deep night, famous suspense novelist fell from the balcony, leaving his young wife an enormous heritage. Accident, or calculated murder?Novelist's nephew secretly began investigation.He found a hidden manuscript, which contains a creep story, as well as the key clues concerning its author's death.
detailed_description:
About Us

hope you enjoy our game.

Thank you.

-QQ：991658228

- -BUG Feedback QQ：1007876176

-EMAIL：Spicygames@163.com

About Game

THE SUSPECTED MURDER is a story-driven adventure game.

--The game has two parts, the Real World and Fictional World.

--Two different parts have different vision styles as well as gaming experiences, with clues and information interconnected.

Story

--The backstage of the story is set in modern China. The core of the story is about marriage, about husband & wife, whom, sometimes, are the most familiar strangers,even the horrible ones.

--Within the investigators' eyes, the player will travel through different worlds between reality and fiction, seeking truth through multiple pieces of information, concerning the death and the hidden life the famous novelist.

Gameplay

--in the Real world, player focus on investigation in daily thing like laptops, cell phones etc，which needs more logical thinking and daily life experience.

--in the Fictional World, player interacts with environment and objects, which takes more intuition, as well as imagination to solve.

Manga-style

--The fiction part of the game is unreal and artistic, with a classic black & white manga vision style.

--The real world life is oppressive, while the fiction world is wild. Traveling in fiction is an adventure, and a psychological insight into the character's twisted mind.

Multiple Endings

--The story has three endings. When the truth is finally revealed, the audience will have the opportunity to make key choices, which leads the story to completely different terminals.

--The key to the ending choices, is every audience's own judgement and empathy for the main characters. Law, emotion, or justice, what are you going to choose?
